headline: EMCOR GROUP INC (NYSE:EME) Passes Minervini Trend Template and High Growth Momentum Screen
summary: EMCOR Group (EME) combines Mark Minervini's Trend Template with strong High Growth Momentum fundamentals—accelerating earnings, rising sales, and improving margins in a confirmed uptrend.
